title: Kalshi Copybot
tagline: Tried to copy Kalshi's best traders. The tape is anonymous, so it stalks large prints instead.

title: Polymarket Copybot
tagline: Follows Polymarket whales with a $17 bankroll and five layers of risk checks between it and a trade.

title: Coin Sniper
tagline: pump.fun mints 1,000 coins an hour. This texts me the handful where the creator put real SOL in.
